body_excerpt: In usb_gadget_giveback_request of core.c, there is a possible use after free out of bounds read due to a race condition. This could lead to local information disclosure with System execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: In usb_gadget_giveback_request of core.c, there is a possible use after free out of bounds read due to a race condition. This could lead to local information disclosure with System execution privilege
